name: Sarkhej Roza
description: 15th-century mosque and tomb complex blending Hindu and Islamic architecture.

name: Swaminarayan Akshardham Temple
description: Major Swaminarayan temple complex known for its intricate stone carvings.

name: Calico Museum of Textiles
description: World-renowned museum of antique and modern Indian textiles.

name: Sabarmati Riverfront Park
description: Riverside promenade and park running along the Sabarmati River.

name: Law Garden
description: Popular evening garden known for its night market and street food stalls.

name: Kankaria Lake
description: Historic artificial lake with a walking promenade, zoo, and toy train.

name: Sabarmati River
description: The river running through Ahmedabad, lined by the riverfront development.

name: Dharoi Dam
description: Earthen dam on the Sabarmati River, a popular day-trip spot from the city.

name: Sabarmati Riverfront Sunset Point
description: Riverside spot popular with locals for watching the sunset over the Sabarmati.

name: Kamla Nehru Zoological Garden
description: Zoo adjacent to Kankaria Lake, home to a variety of animal and bird species.

name: Mandvi Beach
description: Coastal beach in Kutch, a popular day-trip destination from Ahmedabad.

name: Zanzari Waterfall
description: Seasonal waterfall outside the city, popular during the monsoon months.

name: Manek Chowk
description: Historic market square that turns into a famous night food market after dark.

name: Ahmedabad One Mall
description: Large shopping mall with retail stores, dining, and a multiplex.

name: Science City Ahmedabad
description: Science museum and amusement complex with interactive exhibits and an aquarium.

name: Symphony Lounge
description: Rooftop lounge known for live music and a lively evening crowd.

name: Manek Chowk Night Food Market
description: Famous late-night street food hub serving Gujarati snacks and sweets.

name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad
description: One of India's premier business schools, known for its iconic brick campus.

name: Thol Bird Sanctuary
description: Wetland bird sanctuary near Ahmedabad, home to migratory and resident birds.
